description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style travel trailer with a bright red body and a dark, metallic roof. The trailer features two axles with four wheels, and a black trim runs horizontally along the lower section. The front of the trailer has a triangular tow hitch for attachment to a vehicle, while the rear includes a single swing door with a small handle. There are three rectangular windows on one side, providing natural light to the interior, and a single entry door located towards the rear on the same side. The trailer sits on a green, irregularly shaped base, suggesting a patch of grass or ground.
description: A red, vintage-style travel trailer with a dark roof, side windows, and a rear swing door, mounted on four wheels with a front tow hitch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded front face, black tow hitch, and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_1: Side view displaying three rectangular windows, a rear entry door, and two visible wheels on the near side.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the single swing door, taillights, and the absence of windows on the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the entry door open, three windows visible, and the tow hitch extending forward.
attribute_door_configuration: single rear swing door, single side entry door
